name: Acme International Holdings Limited
summary: Acme International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides design and build solutions for fa√É¬ßade and building maintenance unit (BMU) system works in Hong Kong. Its activities include design, preparation of shop drawings and structural calculations, procurement of building materials and BMU systems, installation and logistics arrangement services, on-site project supervision, post-completion maintenance services, project management, and post-completion repair and maintenance. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
